comments.author: maoxian-1
comments.body: Because saxesParser parse the content before the stream ending, It will break the stream

comments.author: vicary
comments.body: @maoxian-1 Thanks for the explanation. If at all possible in your use case, I would really suggest setting stream encoding before chunking happens at `for await (const chunk of iterable) {` instead of slicing the last byte afterwards.
